title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
summary: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.
title_es: OpenAI presenta solicitud confidencial de IPO ante la SEC
bajada: OpenAI confirmó que ha presentado un borrador confidencial de S-1 a la SEC para iniciar su proceso de salida a bolsa. La empresa aún no ha determinado el cronograma para acciones futuras, pero se suma a la tendencia de startups de IA buscando financiamiento público.
bajada_en: OpenAI confirmed it has filed a confidential S-1 draft with the SEC to begin its IPO process. The company has not yet determined timing for further action, but joins the trend of AI startups seeking public funding.

title: OpenAI Confidentially Files for IPO on the Heels of SpaceX and Anthropic
summary: The ChatGPT-maker announced it has filed paperwork to go public, just a week after rival Anthropic took the same step.
title_es: OpenAI sigue a Anthropic en la carrera hacia el IPO
bajada: OpenAI ha presentado documentación para salir a bolsa una semana después de que su rival Anthropic anunciara su propia intención de hacer IPO. El movimiento marca un hito importante en la consolidación del sector de IA empresarial.
bajada_en: OpenAI has filed IPO paperwork just a week after rival Anthropic announced its own plans to go public. The move marks a significant milestone in the consolidation of the enterprise AI sector.

title: For the 2nd time in weeks, Microsoft packages laced with credential stealer
summary: 73 packages run self-replicating stealer as soon as they're opened by an AI agent.
title_es: Paquetes de Microsoft comprometidos con malware para robo de credenciales
bajada: 73 paquetes en repositorios de Microsoft fueron infectados con código malicioso que roba credenciales cuando son abiertos por agentes de IA. Es el segundo incidente de este tipo en semanas, exponiendo vulnerabilidades críticas en la cadena de suministro de IA.
bajada_en: 73 packages in Microsoft repositories were infected with malicious code stealing credentials when opened by AI agents. It's the second such incident in weeks, exposing critical supply chain vulnerabilities in AI development.

title: Microsoft's open source tools were hacked to steal passwords of AI developers
title_es: Herramientas open source de Microsoft hackeadas para robar contraseñas
bajada: Las herramientas open source de Microsoft fueron comprometidas para extraer contraseñas de desarrolladores de IA. El ataque aprovecha la confianza en los paquetes oficiales para distribuir malware de robo de credenciales.
bajada_en: Microsoft's open source tools were compromised to steal passwords from AI developers. The attack exploited trust in official packages to distribute credential-stealing malware.

title: Lovable says it has hit $500M in annualized revenue, with 1 million new projects a week
summary: Lovable says it has now surpassed $500 million in annualized run-rate revenue and its users are building businesses and replacing internal software.
title_es: Lovable alcanza $500M en ingresos anualizados con 1M proyectos semanales
bajada: La plataforma Lovable reporta haber superado los $500 millones en ingresos anualizados con 1 millón de nuevos proyectos por semana. Los usuarios están utilizando la herramienta para construir negocios y reemplazar software interno, demostrando fuerte adopción.
bajada_en: Lovable reports surpassing $500M in annualized run-rate revenue with 1 million new projects per week. Users are building businesses and replacing internal software with the platform, demonstrating strong adoption.

title: Apple’s AI promises are finally, almost, sort of, here
summary: Apple kicked off its annual developer conference with bold promises about AI. The company, CEO Tim Cook said, would be "introducing new technologies and innovations that push the limits on what's possible." But its slew of announcements - centered on a brand-new "Siri AI" - had more to do with catching up. After almost entirely […]
title_es: Apple finalmente integra IA en Siri con Gemini de Google
bajada: Apple presentó en WWDC 2026 una arquitectura renovada de Siri basada en modelos Google Gemini, buscando ponerse al día en la carrera de IA. Los anuncios incluyen nuevas capacidades personalizadas, aunque los críticos señalan que se enfoca más en alcanzar competidores que innovar.
bajada_en: Apple unveiled at WWDC 2026 a revamped Siri architecture powered by Google Gemini models, aiming to catch up in the AI race. Announcements include personalized capabilities, though critics note the focus is catching up rather than leading.

title: Apple reveals new AI architecture built around Google Gemini models
title_es: Apple construye nueva arquitectura de IA con modelos Gemini
bajada: Apple reveló su nueva arquitectura de IA construida alrededor de los modelos Gemini de Google en su conferencia anual de desarrolladores. La asociación marca un cambio estratégico en la apuesta de IA de Apple.
bajada_en: Apple revealed its new AI architecture built around Google's Gemini models at its annual developer conference. The partnership marks a strategic shift in Apple's AI bet.

title: NVIDIA and LG Group Build an AI Factory to Advance Physical AI, Mobility and AI Infrastructure
summary: NVIDIA and LG Group are building an AI factory to accelerate LG Group’s next wave of AI-driven businesses, spanning robotics, autonomous driving, data center technologies and GPU cloud services. The AI factory will provide LG Group with accelerated computing infrastructure to train, simulate, validate and deploy AI-based applications across its key businesses.  The collaboration brings […]
title_es: NVIDIA y LG crean AI Factory para robótica y conducción autónoma
bajada: NVIDIA y LG Group establecieron una AI Factory para acelerar el desarrollo de aplicaciones de IA en robótica, conducción autónoma e infraestructura de centros de datos. La colaboración proporciona a LG infraestructura de computación acelerada para entrenar y desplegar modelos a escala.
bajada_en: NVIDIA and LG Group established an AI Factory to accelerate AI application development in robotics, autonomous driving, and data center infrastructure. The collaboration provides LG with accelerated computing infrastructure to train and deploy models at scale.

title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Ready to Get Personal
summary: From a stand-alone app to a Google Gemini partnership, here’s everything you need to know from WWDC 2026 about Apple’s upcoming overhaul of Siri.
title_es: Nuevo Siri de Apple: IA personalizada con integración Gemini
bajada: Apple presentó un Siri completamente rediseñado que integra capacidades de IA avanzadas, incluyendo asociación con Google Gemini. La herramienta promete ser más personal y contextual, usando datos del dispositivo para mejorar interacciones.
bajada_en: Apple unveiled a completely redesigned Siri integrating advanced AI capabilities, including partnership with Google Gemini. The tool promises to be more personal and contextual, using device data for better interactions.

title: Apple announced new on device inference engine for Apple Silicon
summary: This news seem to have flown under the radar. Apple announced CoreAI on WWDC which is basically a future replacement for CoreML and an alternative to MLX/llama.cpp/torch for on-device optimized inference, especially on phones and tablets.The model weights need to be converted similarly to CoreML via python script, atm the list of supported models is mostly from mid 2025 year thoughhttps://github.com/apple/coreai-models/tree/main/models. For anyone wondering how is that anything new - CoreML out of the box didn't even support models beyond a few billion params and had very limited supported operations pool. This implies big update to ANE ops too.There's nothing on performance yet, it is very likely that it's inferior to pure MLX on GPU atm. The only other interesting thing is that they boast 20B model to be deployed on device for foundation modelshttps://machinelearning.apple.com/research/introducing-third-generation-of-apple-foundation-models, which looks to be lazily loaded MoE, so perhaps CoreAI will allow to deploy larger models with apps as well.submitted by/u/bakawolf123[link][comments]
title_es: Apple lanza CoreAI: nuevo motor de inferencia en dispositivo
bajada: Apple anunció CoreAI en WWDC, un nuevo framework para inferencia optimizada en dispositivos Apple Silicon que reemplazará CoreML. Soporta modelos hasta 20B parámetros con carga lazy (MoE) y es una alternativa a MLX/llama.cpp para desarrolladores.
bajada_en: Apple announced CoreAI at WWDC, a new framework for optimized on-device inference on Apple Silicon that will replace CoreML. It supports models up to 20B parameters with lazy loading (MoE) and is an alternative to MLX/llama.cpp for developers.

title: Sandstone raises $30M to bring AI to in-house legal teams
summary: Sandstone's Series A was led by Lightspeed Partners, with participation from Sequoia.
title_es: Sandstone recauda $30M para llevar IA a equipos legales internos
bajada: La startup Sandstone cerró una ronda Serie A liderada por Lightspeed Partners, con participación de Sequoia, para escalar su plataforma de IA diseñada específicamente para departamentos legales internos. El funding refleja el creciente interés en automatizar tareas legales.
bajada_en: Sandstone closed a Series A round led by Lightspeed Partners, with participation from Sequoia, to scale its AI platform designed for in-house legal teams. The funding reflects growing interest in automating legal work.

title: Microsoft AI chief walks back comments about AI taking over white-collar work
summary: Microsoft AI head Mustafa Suleyman is walking back his statement about AI automating jobs done by white-collar workers, including lawyers, accountants, and project managers, within two years. During an episode of Decoder on Monday, Suleyman says he meant AI will help these workers complete tasks, rather than take over their jobs: Sending an email, having […]
title_es: Microsoft matiza predicciones sobre IA y empleos de oficina
bajada: Mustafa Suleyman, jefe de IA en Microsoft, se retracta de afirmaciones anteriores sobre la automatización de empleos de oficina en dos años. Ahora enfatiza que la IA ayudará a trabajadores a completar tareas más que reemplazarlos completamente.
bajada_en: Microsoft AI chief Mustafa Suleyman walks back statements about AI automating white-collar jobs within two years. He now emphasizes AI will help workers complete tasks rather than fully replace them.

title: How an Agent Built a 3D Paris Gallery by Chaining Two Hugging Face Spaces
title_es: Agente de IA crea galería 3D de París encadenando Spaces
bajada: Un agente construido con Hugging Face Spaces demostró la capacidad de encadenar múltiples modelos para crear una galería 3D interactiva de París. El ejemplo ilustra el potencial de los agentes de IA para tareas complejas multimodales.
bajada_en: An agent built with Hugging Face Spaces demonstrated the ability to chain multiple models to create an interactive 3D gallery of Paris. The example illustrates the potential of AI agents for complex multimodal tasks.

title: Learning to lead in a hybrid human-AI enterprise
summary: As adoption of AI agents looks set to surge by as much as 300% in the next two years, leadership teams are carefully considering the implications of a hybrid human-AI workforce.  Unlike existing enterprise-level automation that relies on manual input, AI agents are capable of autonomously coordinating complex tasks, interacting with multiple tools and environments across…
title_es: Liderazgo en empresas híbridas: humanos y agentes de IA
bajada: La adopción de agentes de IA en empresas podría crecer hasta 300% en los próximos dos años, obligando a líderes a repensar la gestión de equipos híbridos. Los agentes pueden coordinar autonomamente tareas complejas, requiriendo nuevas estrategias de liderazgo.
bajada_en: Enterprise AI agent adoption could surge up to 300% in the next two years, forcing leaders to rethink hybrid team management. Agents can autonomously coordinate complex tasks, requiring new leadership strategies.

title: Syll: Open-Source Personal Automation with Cross-Surface Execution
summary:
arXiv:2606.07594v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Personal AI agents must increasingly operate across APIs, shells, web surfaces, and desktop GUIs, yet many systems remain tuned to a single interface and offer limited support for user teaching and auditability. We present Syll, an open-source, self-hosted multimodal agent harness that unifies MCP/API tools, CLI execution, and visual GUI control in a modular runtime, enabling agents to coordinate computer use across heterogeneous interfaces while streamlining how users and agents exchange information. At the core of Syll is a bidirectional user-agent interaction layer: users teach procedures through direct demonstration, which Syll compiles into reusable skills; agent execution is translated back into multimodal evidence -- logs, keyframes, and approval checkpoints -- for inspection and control. Syll further externalizes memory, skills, routines, and governance as editable local artifacts, supporting straightforward inspection, extension, and downstream development. Our implementation has been validated on production desktop applications including Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Stardew Valley, macOS Finder and others. We report mechanism-oriented studies that validate multimodal routing, teachable GUI replay, and persistent local artifacts. We hope Syll can serve as a practical open-source foundation for personal automation that users can teach, inspect, and continuously extend.
title_es: Syll: agente open source para automatización personal multiplataforma
bajada: Investigadores presentaron Syll, un agente de IA open source y autohospedado que unifica APIs, CLI y controles GUI en un runtime modular. Permite a usuarios enseñar procedimientos por demostración directa y ejecutar tareas complejas en múltiples interfaces.
bajada_en: Researchers presented Syll, an open-source self-hosted AI agent that unifies APIs, CLI, and GUI controls in a modular runtime. It lets users teach procedures through direct demonstration and execute complex tasks across multiple interfaces.
